2605.01423.title: HepScript: A Dual-Use DSL for Human-AI Collaborative Data Analysis Workflows in High-Energy Physics
2605.01423.paper_summary: The escalating data scale in High-Energy Physics (HEP) fuels a growing aspiration for higher analytical efficiency. While Large Language Models (LLMs) offer a path toward automation via agentic AI, they struggle with complex scientific workflows that require deep domain knowledge and are tightly coupled to experiment-specific codebases. To address this, we introduce a methodology centered on HepScript, a dual-use Domain-Specific Language (DSL) for HEP data analysis workflows. HepScript serves as a shared formal interface, abstracting HEP analysis logic into a constrained syntax that is both intuitive for human experts and reliably generable by AI agents. First developed for the Beijing Spectrometer III (BESIII) experiment, HepScript hides the complexity of the underlying software stack, translating high-level analysis intent into low-level, production-ready code. In our case studies, this abstraction reduces the required human-written code by 93\%. Crucially, HepScript's constrained grammar defines a tractable action space, enabling AI agents to autonomously generate executable specifications for core analysis stages directly from published literature with a 95\% success rate. Our work demonstrates a scalable pathway toward human-AI collaborative systems, where a formally specified DSL acts as an unambiguous translation layer between human expertise, AI automation, and production environment, rendering previously intractable automation problems solvable.
2605.01423.paper_summary_zh: 隨著高能物理（HEP）數據規模的擴大，對更高分析效率的渴望也在增長。雖然大型語言模型（LLMs）提供了一條通往通過自主AI實現自動化的道路，但它們在需要深厚領域知識並且與特定實驗代碼庫緊密耦合的複雜科學工作流程中卻面臨挑戰。為了解決這個問題，我們介紹了一種以HepScript為中心的方法論，這是一種用於HEP數據分析工作流程的雙重用途領域專用語言（DSL）。HepScript作為一個共享的正式接口，將HEP分析邏輯抽象為一種受限語法，對人類專家來說直觀，並且可以由AI代理可靠地生成。HepScript最初是為北京光譜儀III（BESIII）實驗開發的，它隱藏了底層軟件堆棧的複雜性，將高層次的分析意圖轉換為低層次、可生產的代碼。在我們的案例研究中，這種抽象將所需的人類編寫代碼減少了93%。至關重要的是，HepScript的受限語法定義了一個可處理的行動空間，使AI代理能夠自主地從已發表的文獻中生成核心分析階段的可執行規範，成功率達到95%。我們的工作展示了一條可擴展的途徑，朝著人類與AI協作系統的方向發展，其中一個正式指定的DSL作為人類專業知識、AI自動化和生產環境之間的明確翻譯層，使得以前難以處理的自動化問題變得可解決。
2605.01423.author: Junkun Jiao et.al.
2605.01423.authors: Junkun Jiao, Tong Liu, Ke Li, Weimin Song, Yipu Liao, Bolun Zhang, Beijiang Liu, Chang-Zheng Yuan, Yue Sun
